features.name: reduction on 65-bit signal
features.description: Code should include an AND reduction operation on a 65-bit signed signal producing a 1-bit result

features.name: xorr reduction in fsm condition
features.description: Code should include an FSM with async reset where next state is computed using XOR reduction of a signal in a when condition

features.name: nested aggregate array indexing with large bitwidths
features.description: Code should include deeply nested aggregate types with array indexing and bit fields exceeding 64 bits (e.g., 65-bit, 56-bit, 57-bit)

features.name: pad of aggregate field to larger bitwidth
features.description: Code should include a pad operation on a large aggregate field (56-bit) to an even larger width (40 bits beyond original)

features.name: async reset register with state feedback
features.description: Code should include a register with async reset feeding back into combinational logic that computes the next state
